profile.name: Thaw Zin Toe
profile.title: Senior Android Engineer
profile.subtitle: 8+ Years · Android · KMP · Kotlin
profile.bio: Results-driven Senior Android Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing, developing, and delivering high-performance mobile applications across fintech, F&B, hospitality, and e-commerce domains. Expert in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture, MVVM, and multi-module project structures. Proven track record of improving app performance by 40%, boosting user engagement by 25%, and reducing deployment errors by 25%. Experienced in leading cross-functional teams, mentoring junior engineers, and driving CI/CD adoption.

projects.title: Smashburger
projects.description: Enterprise F&B ordering application for Jollibee Foods Corporation serving millions of end users across Southeast Asia. Built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

projects.title: Resorts World Sentosa
projects.description: Hospitality and entertainment app for Singapore's premier resort destination. Led Jetpack Compose adoption, reducing UI development time by 40% and improving app responsiveness.

projects.title: Property Flow Thailand
projects.description: Real estate platform with Stripe payment integration and MixPanel analytics for property transactions in Thailand. Boosted user engagement by 25%.

projects.title: DONKI
projects.description: Retail e-commerce application for Don Quijote discount chain with offline-first architecture using Room database and Kotlin Coroutines.

projects.title: Htwet Toe
projects.description: Consumer mobile application with architecture migration from legacy code to MVVM and Clean Architecture, resolving critical bugs and improving stability.

achievements: Develop Android applications for enterprise clients including Jollibee Foods Corporation, serving millions of end users across Southeast Asia.
Architect cross-platform mobile solutions using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), reducing shared business logic development time by 30%.
Mentor junior developers through ADPList and Groundbreaker on Android architecture and Kotlin best practices.
Implement CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Fastlane, streamlining build and deployment workflows.
Boosted user engagement by 25% by integrating Stripe Payment SDK and MixPanel analytics for Property Flow Thailand.
Designed modular Android architecture components using Kotlin Design Patterns, adopted across 3 product teams.
Authored comprehensive unit tests with JUnit and Mockito, achieving 80%+ code coverage.
Established CI/CD pipelines, reducing release cycle time by 40% and minimizing manual deployment errors.
Introduced Jetpack Compose at Resorts World Sentosa, reducing UI development time by 40%.
Improved code quality and app stability by 20% through performance optimization and memory leak detection.
Built offline-first feature modules for DONKI retail app using Room database and Kotlin Coroutines.
Implemented MVVM with Clean Architecture, accelerating feature development speed by 15%.
Collaborated with UX/UI designers, achieving 95% user approval rating for newly launched features.
Integrated RESTful APIs with Retrofit and OkHttp, implementing efficient data caching and error handling.
Directed a team of 4 Android developers for the MyDoctor healthcare application, enhancing delivery efficiency by 20%.
Reduced post-deployment errors by 25% through extensive test cases and technical documentation.
Led architecture migration from monolithic to modular Clean Architecture, improving build times.
Refactored legacy codebase to Clean Architecture with MVVM, improving maintainability and testability.
Implemented media playback features using Google ExoPlayer for a podcast streaming application.
Reduced boilerplate code by 25% using Kotlin Extensions, Coroutines, and Sealed Classes.
Migrated Htwet Toe application to MVVM with Clean Architecture, resolving critical bugs and improving stability.
Developed core features using Java and Kotlin across the full Android development lifecycle.
Participated in Agile sprints, collaborating with QA teams for thorough testing and on-time delivery.
